sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_halfMD5 (id UInt64, hash_value UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_halfMD5 VALUES (1, halfMD5('example', 'data')), (2, halfMD5('fuzz', 'testing', 42));
UPDATE test_halfMD5 SET hash_value = halfMD5('updated', 'value') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, hash_value, toTypeName(hash_value) AS type FROM test_halfMD5 WHERE hash_value = halfMD5('example', 'data');
